name: PipeLine Raw 1ft - 5600K
comment:
The Raws are made for customization, with a 3-pin XLR plug to allow the user to control the
electronic configuration. BB&S makes a DMX 512/RDM Single Color Controller for the Raw,
or users can come up with their own solution.
• Ultra High TLCI: 3200K or 5600K
• Available in 1’, 2’, 3’ or 4’ lengths
• Flicker-free dimming from 100-0%
• Extremely high light output
• Wide 180° light dispersion
• With 3-Pin XLR
